comments.LineComment: | ISO fit classes and surface finish specifications.
| ISO fit classes for hole/shaft systems:
| - **Clearance fits**: H11/c11, H9/d9, H8/f7, H7/g6, H7/h6
| Surface roughness Ra in micrometers, from mirror polish to as-cast.

value.value: Sliding fit - accurate location, free movement
Locational transition fit - may have slight clearance/interference
Medium drive fit - assembly by press
